popularStory.headline: en.Wikipedia Valdemar II of Denmark
popularStory.description: Valdemar II (9 May 1170 – 28 March 1241), called Valdemar the Victorious or Valdemar the Conqueror (Valdemar Sejr), was the King of Denmark from 1202 until his death in 1241. The nickname Sejr is a la …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen於1170年5月30日出生在丹麥里伯里伯時，他的父親Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen39歲，母親Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark29歲。他於1202年與Ingibiorg von Sachsen結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1241年3月28日在丹麥沃丁波格享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen于1170年5月30日出生在丹麦里伯里伯时，他的父亲Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen39岁，母亲Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark29岁。他于1202年与Ingibiorg von Sachsen结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1241年3月28日在丹麦沃丁波格享年70岁。

meanings: Americanized form of French (or French Canadian)   Cyr  .

variants.name: Sayer
meanings: English: common occupational name from Middle English sayer, a phonetic variant of Sawyer , which in Wales and neighboring English counties may have been reinforced by the synonymous Welsh saer ‘carpenter’ and everywhere by a possible borrowing into Middle English of Old French seieor, saieur ‘sawyer’.

English: rare occupational name perhaps denoting an assayer of metals, or a servant who tasted his lord's food before serving, from Middle English saiour ‘assayer, tester’ (a shortened form of Old French assaiour, ultimately from Late Latin exagium, a derivative of exagmināre ‘to weigh’).
English: rare occupational name for a professional reciter or minstrel, from Middle English seier(e) ‘speaker’.

en.lifeSummary: When Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen was born on 30 May 1170, in Ribe, Ribe, Denmark, his father, Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen, was 39 and his mother, Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark, was 29. He married Ingibiorg von Sachsen in 1202. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 28 March 1241, in Vordingborg, Denmark, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen est né le 30 mai 1170, à Ribe, Ribe, Danemark, son père, Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Ingibiorg von Sachsen en 1202. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 28 mars 1241, à Vordingborg, Danemark, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen am 30. Mai 1170 in Ribe, Ribe, Dänemark geboren wurde, war sein Vater Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen 39 und seine Mutter Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark 29. Er hat 1202 Ingibiorg von Sachsen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 28. März 1241 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Vordingborg, Dänemark.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen è nato il il 30 maggio 1170 nel Ribe, Ribe, Danimarca, il suo padre, Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Ingibiorg von Sachsen nel 1202. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 28 marzo 1241, nel Vordingborg, Danimarca, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsenが1170年5月30日にデンマークリベリベで生まれた時，父Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsenは39歳，母Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmarkは29歳であった。1202年にIngibiorg von Sachsenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1241年3月28日にデンマークボルディングボルグで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen(이)가 1170년 5월 30일 덴마크 리브 리브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1202년 Ingibiorg von Sachsen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1241년 3월 28일 덴마크 보르딩볼그에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.30 May 1170–28 March 1241: 1170 оны Тавдугаар сарын 30–1241 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 28

pt.30 May 1170–28 March 1241: 30 de maio de 1170–28 de março de 1241
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen nasceu em 30 de maio de 1170, em Ribe, Ribe, Dinamarca, seu pai, Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Ingibiorg von Sachsen em 1202. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 28 de março de 1241, em Vordingborg, Dinamarca, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen родился 30 мая 1170 г. в местности риб, риб, Дания, его отцу по имени Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Ingibiorg von Sachsen в 1202 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 28 марта 1241 г. в местности фордингборг, Дания в возрасте 70 лет.

es.30 May 1170–28 March 1241: 30 de mayo de 1170–28 de marzo de 1241
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen nació el 30 de mayo de 1170, en Ribe, Ribe, Dinamarca, su papá, Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Ingibiorg von Sachsen en 1202. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 28 de marzo de 1241, en Vordingborg, Dinamarca, a la edad de 70 años.
